title: CISA Urges Endpoint Management System Hardening After Cyberattack Against US Org

scripts.content: SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx www\.stryker\.com" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-426c271ffbb4'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((query IN ("www.stryker.com"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count
